incidents.title: Malicious C2 Communication & Rapid File Modification
incidents.description:
SIEM Alert ID: 98421. Critical alert triggered on host endpoint 10.0.4.23. 

Detection details:
- System observed initiating outbound connections to known malicious C2 IP address: 185.220.101.5.
- Within 90 seconds of connection, host system EDR logged 450+ rapid file modification alerts (Bulk extension renames to .locked).
- Target machine is listed in Asset Registry as 'prod-db-01', hosting core customer PII databases.

incidents.title: Anomalous Off-Hours Source Code Download
incidents.description:
Data Loss Prevention alert for user account: dev-ops-mitch (Senior DevOps Engineer).

Detection details:
- User logged in via corporate VPN at 2:14 AM on Sunday from a residential IP address.
- Initiated a bulk clone and download of 14 private enterprise repositories containing proprietary microservice source code.
- Total data transferred: 52.4 GB. 
- Historical behavioral baseline for this user is less than 1.5 GB of daily network traffic during standard operational hours (9 AM - 6 PM).
